status_line: Sunday 11:39 PM UTC — Big news from SARAH: 9.11 GB of Nolan assets finally landed from Downloads — 3 hero MOV cuts and 49 Artlist SFX now in the pipeline. GUARDIAN hits 41 cycles dark with no sign of life, still blocking T2 final and Gallery delivery. Lands' End is 4 days out and the personal letter to Sarah Sylvester still isn't drafted. SCOUT's Smucker commit is staged but needs a manual push.

agents.last_action: Apr 26 daily report: Gallery flag resolved (PARK filed deck). Three active flags: Lands' End Apr 30, Macy's Q2 window open, GUARDIAN 15+ cycles dark. Two-PARK-deck decision pending (Gallery standalone vs. MAKE IT v9).

agents.name: PARK
agents.last_action: Two decks delivered: T2 v8 (43MB) and Gallery campaign deck v1. Decision pending: Gallery standalone vs. unified MAKE IT v9.

agents.name: GUARDIAN
agents.last_action: No activity — 41 consecutive missed cycles. Blocking Sharpie brand voice validation and both Gallery and T2 client deliveries.

agents.name: PERSONA
agents.last_action: Dependency satisfied — SCOUT and MAESTRO both active downstream.
